failures.description: The agent fabricated a cheapest item and price not present in the ProductCatalogSearch results, replacing the actual cheapest item 1240311797 at $137.17 with nonexistent item 0000000000 at $0.01.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for the cheapest available Electric Kettle. The tool result at index 3 provided 11 available electric kettles sorted by ascending price, with the cheapest item_id 1240311797 priced at 137.17. At index 4, the Executor instead claimed item 0000000000 costs $0.01. That item_id and price are absent from all available context and tool output, and the answer relies on this fabricated value. This is not an invalid invocation, unsupported intent, underspecification, guardrail, or system failure. The later Evaluator repeats the same fabricated claim rather than resolving it.
